recommendations.title: Bulletproof Monk
recommendations.overview: A mysterious and immortal Tibetan kung fu master, who has spent the last 60 years traveling around the world protecting the ancient Scroll of the Ultimate, mentors a selfish street kid in the ancient intricacies of kung fu.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda: Secrets of the Masters
recommendations.overview: Po and the Furious Five uncover the legend of three of kung fu's greatest heroes: Master Thundering Rhino, Master Storming Ox, and Master Croc.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda

recommendations.title: The Paper Tigers
recommendations.overview: Three middle aged men polish their martial arts skills to avenge their fallen master.
